expected_patch_effect: Render ACP email state with separate statuses instead of an ambiguous/incorrect boolean-only display.
Stop treating expired cache/key existence as the source of truth; confirmation should work until the stored confirmation record says it expires.
Define/keep hide_qt_warning in qutebrowser.utils.qtlog, not qutebrowser.utils.log, and update all references/tests accordingly.
Expose a reachable WebFinger handler at `/.well-known/webfinger` instead of returning 404.
Look up the userslug locally and return HTTP 404 for unknown accounts.
A block entry for example.com must also block sub.example.com and deeper subdomains.
Iterate over widened hostnames of the request host and return blocked on the first membership hit in either blocked-host set.
Collection-name validation must fail for reserved keywords in either namespace or collection segment.
A collection name with a keyword namespace is invalid.
Explicit Authorization headers must not be overridden by netrc-derived Basic auth when netrc usage is disabled.
Add a boolean option that disables reading ~/.netrc and makes the module honor the caller's header exactly.
Add a property-value accessor on WikidataEntity that returns all usable values for a requested property.
Return values in statement order, ignore malformed entries, and yield [] when nothing usable is present.
Replace unconditional changelog-after-upgrade behavior with a setting-controlled threshold that can suppress patch-level prompts.
Change qutebrowser_version_changed to return a VersionChange enum value rather than a boolean.
Add session-uploader initialization in the Kubernetes service startup path so the async upload directory is created on disk.
Initialize the Kubernetes service session uploader during setup so exec/attach sessions can run interactively.
Make the service client types and their methods package-private instead of exported.
Rename constructors, types, and methods to unexported forms while keeping use within agents, routers, and tests working.
Read submitted form data separately from the URL query string and prefer body fields when present.
Parse raw POST body form encoding into key, name, description, and seeds fields.
Keep legacy PlayIterator.ITERATING_* and FAILED_* attribute access working on both the class and instances, and emit deprecation warnings.
Render run/failure states as readable names in HostState.__str__ rather than opaque numeric values.
Old remote proxy cache configuration should watch legacy ClusterConfig instead of the split RFD-28 cluster config resources, preventing access errors and re-sync loops.
parse_duration should return 60000 for input "60" and similar plain integers.
parse_duration should return -1 for negative values, fractional values, and malformed unit strings.
Implement exact modifier-set matching so extra ctrl/alt/shift/meta state prevents a shortcut from firing unless explicitly allowed.
Map equivalent shortcuts to meta/Command on macOS and ctrl/Control on Windows/Linux via platform-aware key combo definitions.
Each vulnerability/source combination is emitted once per source in cveContents instead of producing duplicate records.
Debian severities for one CVE/source are consolidated into one cveContents object with a pipe-separated severity field.
Parser logic must resolve $6-linked MARC fields rather than treating them as unrelated fields.
Processed MARC output must include alternate-script titles and names alongside the main record data.
Alpine OVAL matching must evaluate vulnerabilities against source packages rather than treating every installed binary package as directly affected.
Add a linear benchmark source that yields configs beginning at the lower bound, increments by the configured step, and returns no more benchmarks after exceeding the upper bound.
Have successive GetBenchmark calls return rates 10, 20, 30, 40, 50 before terminating.
Rename the user-facing tab-selection command from :buffer to :tab-select everywhere users encounter it.
Update completion behavior/tests so command-line completion suggestions and log output reference :tab-select, not :buffer.
Renewing a web session should immediately pick up updated user traits and embed them into the new certificate.
The renewed session certificate must include the updated login traits (and, by test intent, updated database-user traits as well).
Read the current hostname from environment state and use an allowlist to decide whether to register the job.
Add conditional scheduling so background jobs register only on designated hosts.
Implement per-event routing that delivers user-action events only to other sessions of the same authenticated user, never back to the originating client.
Compare sender and recipient clientUniqueId and suppress delivery when they match.
Centralize Solr helper functions and mutable Solr state in openlibrary/solr/utils.py, instead of defining them in update_work or other update modules.
When the device list is refreshed after sign-out or any other update, remove stale client-information entries for devices no longer returned by the server.
Block voice broadcast start/preparation in connection-error states and surface a user-facing explanatory dialog/message.
Replace the local plan-to-addon switch logic with the shared resolver for all assistant upsell paths.
Build planIDs uniformly in both flows, with the base plan always present and the addon entry added conditionally.
Update list removal so a single call can remove several specified elements from the list.
Make list removal accept an array argument and correctly process every element in that array.
Batch evaluation should continue processing even if one or more requested flags are disabled, without returning an overall error.
The batch response should contain an entry for every requested flag, ordered to match the input list, with disabled flags represented explicitly.
Remove the invalid-context failure for missing flags and allow bulk evaluation to proceed.
When flags are omitted, evaluate against the current namespace and the provided targeting context.
Check the deny list first and reject matching senders; otherwise, if the allow list is non-empty, permit only senders in that allow list.
When the recipient has incoming chats disabled, the server rejects every inbound chat attempt before considering allow/deny lists.
Accumulate per-file read/open errors, return partial DMIInfo data, and return a combined error containing permission-denied failures.
Parse PRETTY_NAME, NAME, VERSION_ID, VERSION, and ID from os-release and unquote their values before storing them in OSRelease.
Add a pre-upload existence check for the admin file upload target directory.
Return the invalid-path error payload for a missing upload directory.
Add/route artist refresh through a model-layer Albums aggregation method instead of SQL-based refresh logic.
Compute AlbumCount from number of albums, SongCount as summed song counts, and Size as summed sizes.
Invalid source RPM filenames should be downgraded from fatal errors to warnings, and package scanning should continue.
Parsing should extract the epoch from the source RPM filename and incorporate it into both the binary package version and the source package version.
Any gRPC response caused by a canceled context must surface status code Canceled.
Any gRPC response caused by a deadline-exceeded context must surface status code DeadlineExceeded.
When the :open prompt is empty, filesystem completion shows the configured favorite paths.
`completion.open_categories` can include a Filesystem category and `:open` completion displays it as a selectable category.
Introduce a structured multipart/form-data construction path instead of manual byte/string concatenation.
Select among all matching database services instead of committing to the first match.
On tunnel/connection সমস্যা, continue to the next candidate and only fail after exhausting all candidates.
Update trusted cluster role mappings so admin roles map to admin roles on the local side.
Keep OSS users able to authenticate to leaf clusters after the root cluster upgrades to 6.0.
Parse CIDR hosts and produce one enumerated server target per address in the range.
Apply ignoreIPAddresses to delete matching IPs/CIDRs from the enumerated host list before finalizing servers.
Accept inputs like 5s, 2m30s, and 1h for :later, and interpret them as durations rather than literal numeric milliseconds.
Keep plain integers working as millisecond delays while also supporting unit-suffixed durations.
When aliases exist, the drawer renders the aliases list consistently.
When the alias collection is empty, the drawer shows the explicit empty-state message.
requirements.yml collection entries can resolve and install collections from git repositories.
git-based collection installs accept branch/tag/commit identifiers as the version selector.
Move MIME extension mappings and the lossless-format list out of source constants and into a YAML config file.
Serve the losslessFormats UI config value from conf/mime.LosslessFormats and preserve the uppercase comma-separated formatting.
Include 700/710/711 creators in the structured authors array even when a 100 main author is present; do not divert them to contributions.
For linked 880 fields, assign the appropriate script to name and preserve the other script in alternate_names across person, organization, and event fields.
Display.set_queue raises RuntimeError when invoked outside a forked/child process.
Expose a window-width value from UI state that components can read directly and that changes when the window is resized.
Listen for UIStore resize events and refresh the stored width when they occur.
Make the affected Solr updater methods return a 2-tuple instead of a bare SolrUpdateRequest.
Ensure AuthorSolrUpdater.update_key and WorkSolrUpdater.update_key both return (SolrUpdateRequest, list[str]) in that order.
When the user has only one MFA device registered, deletion of that device must be blocked.
The server must reject deletion of the final MFA device whenever the cluster policy requires MFA.
Extend database config loading to read protocol/host/port/user/password/name keys alongside the existing URL field.
Synthesize the final database connection string from discrete fields when URL is absent, including protocol-specific defaults and formatting.
Select the installed kernel package version that matches the running kernel release, even when a newer debug package is also installed.
When scanning an installed system, identify the package records for the currently running debug kernel family and its related modules packages.
Track a startup baseline of device IDs and compare later device updates against it so only post-startup additions count as new sessions.
Show the warning toast when an unverified device appears after startup and is not dismissed or verified.
Generate iptables rules that can use the set extension with --match-set for ipset-backed matching.
Add match_set and match_set_flags inputs and wire them together in rule generation.
Render exactly `length` single-character input boxes and map the controlled value across them.
On valid character entry, update the value and move focus to the next input, if any.
Replace the newline-only substitution with a general CLIXML string escape decoder for `_xDDDD_` patterns.
Decode control characters and surrogate-pair-encoded Unicode into their actual characters in parsed CLIXML output.
Implement validation as an OR over the complete-record rule and the differentiable/strong-identifier rule.
Allow import validation to accept records that are missing some bibliographic metadata when they still have a qualifying strong identifier.
Return warnings independently from the Config object so callers can consume config data without embedded warning state.
Use explicit-presence checks for deprecations rather than value-based checks that can fire on defaults.
Conflict handling for Booknotes must be fully non-destructive; the table contents must remain identical after the failed update.
On work-id collisions, Booknotes updates must not delete or alter existing booknotes rows.
Populate a delegated-auth object in the validated server config when m.authentication discovery succeeds, preserving the reported fields.
Leave delegatedAuthentication undefined unless the discovery block exists and is successful.
When sorting is enabled, order namespaces, flags, segments, and variants by key in a stable deterministic way.
Make export output ordering deterministic instead of varying by backend implementation.
Detect differing album_artist_id values within a compilation and force AlbumArtistID/AlbumArtist to the canonical Various Artists constants.
For compilations, compare all album_artist_id values and keep the existing album artist pair when they are all the same.
The importer must split incoming ISBNs into isbn_10 and isbn_13 lists based on ISBN length.
IA metadata import should emit separate publish_places and publishers fields instead of a single publisher field containing both.
A dependency role should not be re-executed just because multiple roles depend on it.
Tag filtering must not lose role-completion state when a block is followed by a later task.
Register a handler for the store's unexpected close event and invoke recovery logic when it fires.
When the store closes, stop the active Matrix client and open an error dialog for signed-in users.
Parse incoming metadata for the grpcgateway-cookie entry, decode the cookie named flipt_client_token, and authenticate with that token.
Keep the existing Authorization: Bearer token path working exactly as before.
Avoid the QtWebEngine startup state that triggers the network-service crash loop under affected locales.
Add a config flag for enabling the locale workaround, with default false.
Introduce an io.element.e2ee.force_disable config path that can disable E2EE by policy.
Make create-room behavior and room-creation UI reflect forced disabled encryption, including disabling/hiding the toggle.
Repository URLs with an unsupported scheme are rejected during configuration validation with a clear message listing allowed schemes.
OCI configuration parsing recognizes bundles_directory, poll_interval, and authentication instead of dropping or rejecting them.
The patch must stop the MFA-add flow from submitting malformed or incomplete TOTP input in this scenario.
A user who already has one OTP device and one U2F device must be able to add a new OTP device successfully.
Detect the user's audio preference and route non-voice recordings to a higher-quality encoder configuration.
When voice processing/noise suppression is disabled, the recording path must choose the high-quality configuration.
Parse installed package output by preserving empty fields so a blank release remains blank instead of causing later columns to shift left.
Correctly parse the line so the binary package keeps Release="" and the source package is still recognized with the right version components.
The Windows stderr path must decode or replace CLIXML content so the returned stderr is readable text/bytes rather than raw CLIXML fragments.
The patch must preserve surrounding plain stderr and leave incomplete/invalid CLIXML untouched.
The edit flow must validate that the target chat message exists and return a 400 response with the translated invalid-mid message when it does not.
The patch must preserve ownership/permission checks and return cant-edit-chat-message for unauthorized edits.
Unknown key events must be detected and rejected safely instead of constructing an invalid Qt.Key and crashing.
When the new flag is enabled, inactive WordPress plugins and themes are excluded from vulnerability scanning output.
Add conditional filtering so only active WordPress components are kept when the flag is set, instead of scanning every installed plugin/theme.
Add a sink interface and route audit delivery through sink implementations so new destinations can be added without changing audit event generation.
Extend config parsing/defaults to support an `audit` section with sink configuration and related buffering settings.
Eliminate the registration/connectivity bottleneck so all reverse tunnel nodes can reach the cluster under load.
The patch must ensure complete registration, not merely improve average throughput.
Ensure the Trivy-to-Vuls conversion preserves package PURL into models.Library entries inside LibraryScanners.
Populate models.Library.PURL in the final scan result for library findings.
Map each feed item's numeric id into identifiers.open_textbook_library as a string and emit source_records with the matching open_textbook_library:<id> value.
Copy the source title into the import record's title field when present, alongside other preserved bibliographic fields such as isbn_13, languages, and description.
When the existing DB metadata schema version differs from db.SchemaVersion, the logic should decide to download a new database instead of continuing with the old one.
shouldDownload should return true whenever metadata.SchemaVersion is not equal to common.SchemaVersion/db.SchemaVersion.
Avoid raising ValueError on malformed zip timestamp strings during archive freshness checks; treat them as a usable fallback timestamp.
Parse this input without exception and normalize it to the epoch-like lower bound used by the module.
Expanded edition records must always populate a consistent author identifier derived from name plus available date fields.
Matching should succeed or fail based on the actual author/date similarity score, not on absent author identifiers.
Add a shared in-flight guard / disabled state so repeated clicks are ignored until the async action completes.
Wire the updating flag into the button components so they become non-interactive during an active operation.
Allow read-token requests for user-owned archives to succeed even when archiveDataType is not supplied.
BlobAccessTokenFacade.requestReadTokenArchive must accept null archiveDataType without failing.
After a space switch, the selected room tile must instantly show the room last active in that target space.
Space switching must update the active index immediately, even if the room view store has not yet emitted a room change.
Encryption event subtitles/tooltips should say "profile picture" instead of "avatar".
Clickable avatar UI should expose "Profile picture" as its aria-label rather than "Avatar".
Implement per-import progress reporting that emits ongoing updates for the active calendar import and does not conflate it with other simultaneous work.
Ensure the operation's progress tracker is completed/removed at import end so no lingering progress indicator remains.
NowPlaying storage/query behavior must preserve distinct active sessions so GetNowPlaying returns all currently active plays.
Player matching must use a more precise discriminator than the old type field so concurrent sessions do not map to the same player record.
Add a reusable parser that accepts comma-separated integer coordinates and returns a QPoint for valid inputs.
Raise ValueError with the message pattern `String {input} does not match X,Y` for invalid coordinate strings.
Relax or replace the 16MB document-size check in readHeaderAndPayload so larger valid MongoDB messages are accepted.
Allow message sizes at least up to the MongoDB default max message size (48MB) and preserve correct processing for large datasets.
signal_name must always normalize a signal object to just its attribute name, with no extra prefixes, indices, or parameter lists.
signal_name must return 'valueChanged' for overloaded signals, not a decorated signature string containing parameter types or overload information.
Validate source and destination references before copying and fail when either reference is missing a tag.
Create a new destination bundle record that mirrors the source contents while setting destination repository/tag and maintaining valid digest/created-at metadata.
Add application-side conditional rendering so both tabs stop showing QR sign-in unconditionally.
Suppress all QR sign-in sections whenever the feature flag is off.
Add/adjust an elements helper that can determine Proton-origin status from the IsProton field.
isFromProton returns true for both element types when IsProton is 1.
Add/use a user_props persistence model so Last.fm session keys are stored per user rather than as globally prefixed property keys.
Undefined template values must produce an UndefinedError-style failure that names the missing variable, not a generic YAML representer error.
The dumper/filter path must raise or propagate UndefinedError for undefined values rather than converting them into a YAML representer exception.
Use the authenticated user's stable ID as the player association key so casing differences in the username do not prevent finding or creating the correct player.
Persist the player against UserId during registration, and make the test observe UserId rather than UserName.
Reject reorder attempts from non-admin/non-moderator users with a no-privileges error.
Move the selected pinned topic to the requested position while keeping the remaining pinned topics in the correct order.
Make file parsing recover an existing ident field from persisted password entries.
Change _parse_content to return a 3-tuple including ident and update callers accordingly.
The standard-support check returns the correct boolean before and after the configured support cutoff for each OS family/release.
A shared lookup returns the correct EOL record for known family/release combinations in a deterministic way.
